infos.name: 阳台
infos.desc:
Well, here we are in the 阳台.



You don't like doors? Why not try going west, that entranceway is unblocked.

infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You arrive in a 厨房. A standard kind of place.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going east. You don't like doors? Why not try going south, that entranceway is unblocked.

infos.name: 卧室
infos.desc:
You arrive in a 卧室. A normal kind of place.



You don't like doors? Why not try going north, that entranceway is unblocked.

infos.name: hazard variant 9
infos.desc: The hazard variant 9 would seem to be out of place here

infos.name: hazard variant 14
infos.desc: The hazard variant 14 is brand new.

rooms.name: 厨房

rooms.description: 睡前需要检查插座和取暖设备。
